effect.subject: tok_lisraya_color_coral
effect.reserved_for: sparing tertiary accent only; not primary CTAs, headlines, or data; avoid in email sections unless brief calls for it

rule_text: Coral is a sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. [GENERAL] Avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.
intent: Restrict Coral to occasional accent use.
summary: Use Coral sparingly as tertiary accent only; never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data; avoid in email unless specified by brief.
